series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on employees that are not U.S. Citizens that house forms issued by the Department of Homeland Security to document an employee’s ability to work in the United States. Records may include: I-9 Forms and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) federal fiscal years date of hire of employee, or one (1) year date employment is terminated, whatever date is later. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record. ; Electronic: three (3) federal fiscal years date of hire of employee, or one (1) year date employment is terminated, whatever date is later. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying this Record
